chunks.text: EECS Commencement - EECS at Berkeley EECS Commencement Save the Date! 2026 Spring ceremonies Baccalaureate degree ceremony Date: Monday, May 18, 2026 Time: 9:00 a.m. Location: Hearst Greek Theatre Master’s degree ceremony Date: Monday, May 18, 2026 Time: 2:00 p.m. Location: Hearst Greek Theatre Doctoral degree ceremony Date: Thursday, May 21, 2026 Time: 9:00 a.m. Location: Zellerbach Auditorium See Berkeley Engineering Commencements for more information. EECS ceremony, 2019 Information about the College of Engineering Commencements Information about the College of Computing, Data Science, and Society Computer Science Commencement Accessibility If you require an accommodation for effective communication (ASL interpreting/CART captioning, alternative media formats, etc.) or information about campus mobility access features in order to fully participate in this event, please complete this Commencement Accommodations Request Form . If you have additional questions, please reach out to Engagement Programs at bears@berkeley.edu . View Open Faculty Positions
